Title: Indexes fixed amounts and clarifies compliance for life insurance and annuity businesses; repealer
Summary: Indexes fixed dollar amounts in the statute to inflation, authorizes changes to compensation plans, removes obsolete language, and removes unnecessary filing requirements for certain life insurance and annuity businesses.
LawCode: Amd §4228, rpld §4228 sub§ (g), sub§ (f) ¶1 sub¶ (A), Ins L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the insurance law, in relation to indexing fixed amounts and clarifying compliance for certain life insurance and annuity businesses; and to repeal certain provisions of such law relating to obsolete language and unnecessary filing requirements
